nasb.text: and the two kidneys with the fat that is on them, which is on the loins, and the lobe on the liver he shall remove with the kidneys.

esv.text: the two kidneys with the fat that is on them at the loins, and the long lobe of the liver that he shall remove with the kidneys.

cnv.text: 以及兩個腎、腎上近腰旁的脂肪和腎旁的肝葉，一起取下。

ccb.text: 两个肾脏和肾脏上靠近腰部的脂肪以及肝叶。
